name: luly-v0-2-8
description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2.8: optional `tooltipTextColor` + `tooltipBackgroundColor` theme tokens — render the pill behind inline definition terms. Renderer falls back to primary/primaryLight, so the pair is optional and only worth emitting when primary is close to the body background, very exotic, or the brand has a dedicated link/term color.
